<features>
- observable feature: long fur
- observable feature: pointed ears
- observable feature: tabby pattern
</features>
<kb>
- IF [long fur AND pointed ears AND tabby pattern] THEN [20]
- IF [long fur AND white coat AND no tabby pattern] THEN [29]
- IF [large head AND short muzzle AND brown and white coat] THEN [28]
- IF [white coat AND floppy ears AND spotted pattern] THEN [13]
</kb>

<rule_check>
- Rule 1 fires because the image shows a cat with long fur, pointed ears, and a tabby pattern, which matches the features described in the IF condition for class 20.
</rule_check>

<response>20</response>
